# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

A vanilla JavaScript morning checklist SPA for checking what to bring before leaving home. No build system, no package manager, and no test framework. Open `index.html` directly in a browser to run it.

Live demo: https://vaishnav-sh.github.io/todo-app/

## Stack

- **HTML/CSS/JS only** — no transpilation, bundling, or framework
- **Self-contained static app** — current UI no longer depends on Bootstrap, jQuery, or icon libraries
- **Browser storage** — state is persisted with `localStorage`

## Architecture

All logic lives in `src/index.js`. There is no module system, but the file is now organized around a render/update flow instead of ad hoc DOM mutation.

- **State**: Global state is `todos`, `editingTodoId`, and `completedOpen`
- **Persistence**: `persistTodos()` saves to `localStorage` key `morningChecklistItems`; theme and completed-section open state are also persisted separately
- **Migration**: `loadTodos()` still reads the legacy `todos` key and normalizes old data into the new shape before rewriting it
- **Rendering**: `renderAll()` is the main refresh point; it recomputes active/completed lists, summary cards, empty states, and completion message after every state change
- **DOM creation**: Todo cards are created programmatically in `createTodoCard()` and button actions are generated by `getActionButtons()`
- **Actions**: List interactions use event delegation with `button[data-action][data-id]` instead of per-element icon IDs
- **Sections**: Active items render into `#todo-list`; completed items render into `#completed-todo-list-items`; the completed section is collapsible via `#completed-toggle`

## Key Conventions

- **JS naming**: camelCase for functions and variables (`renderAll`, `toggleCompletedVisibility`, `saveEditedTodo`)
- **HTML/CSS naming**: kebab-case or BEM-like modifier classes (`todo--completed`, `action-btn--delete`, `theme-toggle__icon`)
- **Todo object shape**: `{ id: String, text: String, isCompleted: Boolean, isImportant: Boolean, createdAt: Number, completedAt: Number | null }`
- **Normalization**: New or migrated text values are trimmed and whitespace-collapsed through `normalizeText()` before saving
- **Duplicate handling**: `hasDuplicateText()` blocks duplicate checklist items, including when editing
- **Sorting**: Active items are sorted with important items first; completed items are sorted by `completedAt` descending
- **Theme**: Dark mode uses the `dark-mode` class on `<body>` and updates the text/icon of `#theme-toggle`
- **Styling**: `src/style.css` is built around CSS custom properties; theme changes should usually be done by editing the variables in `:root` and `body.dark-mode`
- **UI copy**: The app is Japanese-first. Prefer Japanese labels, helper text, and status messages unless there is a clear reason to keep English
